MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Steven M. Morger, Esq. 510/834-6600 for pltf & opposing party; Edward A. Treder, Esq. 626/967-4302 for deft & moving party Lonestar Mortgagee Services, LLC; Robert M. Ruben, Esq. 949/622-3340 for deft Fairbanks Capital.
